description: Fix trade details and PnL communication between EA and Python terminal. EA sends wrong data (stale ticket, lastBid as close price, zero lot_size, no profit field). Python calculates PnL incorrectly (raw price diff instead of actual dollar profit).
steps: Step 1: Update WriteConfirmation() in Python_Bridge_EA.mq5 to accept ticket and profit as parameters. Add profit field to CSV header and data row.
Step 2: Fix SL/TP hit detection path to look up actual close price and profit from deal history using HistorySelect/HistoryDealGetDouble. Pass actual tracked ticket, lot volume, and real profit.
Step 3: Fix FILLED confirmation path to pass the actual position ticket (from g_trade.ResultDeal() or position lookup) instead of g_trade.ResultOrder().
Step 4: Update CONFIRMATION_HEADERS in bridge.py to include 'profit' field.
Step 5: Update Python main.py _poll_confirmations() to read profit field from CLOSED confirmation and display actual MT5 P&L. Also read lot_size from confirmation for CLOSED events.
acceptance_criteria: WriteConfirmation() accepts ticket and profit parameters
Confirmation CSV has 'profit' field in header and data
SL/TP hit path uses deal history to get actual close price and profit
SL/TP hit path passes the tracked ticket (not g_trade.ResultOrder())
FILLED path uses g_trade.ResultDeal() for ticket
Python displays MT5's actual profit from confirmation (not raw price diff)
Python reads lot_size from CLOSED confirmation
verification: Verify Python_Bridge_EA.mq5 WriteConfirmation has profit parameter and writes it
findings: 531 tests pass, 1 pre-existing failure (test_price_structure_config_defaults expects 0.15 but code has 0.05 - unrelated). The staleness timeout uses max(max_hold_bars*60*3, 300) to avoid false positives in tests with small max_hold_bars values. Confirmation polling reduced from 50ms to 10ms for near-instant sync. The EA fallback for FILLED ticket uses g_trade.ResultDeal() which returns the deal ticket (more reliable than ResultOrder for position tracking). MQL5 changes validated by code review only (no compiler available).
